symptom_vector: DNS lookup failure, DNS resolution timeout, incorrect DNS response, DNS server unreachable, truncated DNS packet affecting cartservice operations

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: Component [checkoutservice] experienced [server_error_ratio, error_ratio, dns, http.resp.status, 302] fault.
reasoning_chain: Step 1: Check Metadata - Confirm faulty component is [checkoutservice] (From Ground Truth instance field)

Step 2: Check Observation - Found keyword [transport, Error, while, dialing] in Log (From GT key_observations) - appears in frontend logs as 'transport: Error while dialing dial tcp: lookup cartservice on 10.233.33.139:53: server misbehaving'

Step 3: Check Observation - Found keyword [http.resp.status, 302] in Log (From GT key_observations) - appears in trace status combinations as 'HTTP status code: 500' (though GT mentions 302, actual data shows 500)

Step 4: Check Observation - Found keyword [error, error_ratio, server_error, server_error_ratio] in Metric (From GT key_observations) - checkoutservice-0 shows server_error_ratio from 0.0 to 86.75 and error_ratio from 0.0 to 86.75
Step 5: Derive Root Cause - Based on above features, determined cause is [server_error_ratio, error_ratio, dns, http.resp.status, 302] (From Ground Truth key_metrics)

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Error message 'transport: Error while dialing dial tcp: lookup cartservice on 10.233.33.139:53: server misbehaving' appears in frontend logs with high occurrence counts (88, 18, 164 times)
critical_checks.instruction: Search for keyword 'transport: Error while dialing' in Log data from frontend services

critical_checks.expected_pattern: HTTP status code 500 appears in trace status combinations for frontend services
critical_checks.instruction: Check trace status combinations for 'HTTP status code: 500' in frontend trace data

critical_checks.expected_pattern: checkoutservice-0 shows server_error_ratio increased from 0.0 to 86.75 and error_ratio increased from 0.0 to 86.75 during anomaly period
critical_checks.instruction: Check metric data for checkoutservice-0 server_error_ratio and error_ratio values during anomaly timeframe

critical_checks.expected_pattern: checkoutservice->cartservice calls show extreme latency increase from 8453.27ms to 1322548.26ms (156.4x increase)
critical_checks.instruction: Analyze trace data for checkoutservice to cartservice calls showing latency anomalies

critical_checks.expected_pattern: RPC error messages with 'rpc error: code = Internal desc = cart failure' and 'rpc error: code = Unavailable desc = connection error'
critical_checks.instruction: Search for keyword 'rpc error' in frontend log messages
